positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical composition featuring a bioluminescent forest scene. The central focus is a grouping of ethereal, glowing flora and fauna (moths, glowing mushrooms, root structures) set against a deep twilight background. Use clean, bold, graphic silhouettes and strong contrast (deep indigo and midnight blue contrasted with vibrant turquoise and neon lime green glowing elements). The overall style should be highly detailed, vector-art influenced, with a clean, intricate, tattoo-sheet aesthetic suitable for screen printing. The composition must be centralized and balanced, evoking a sense of mystical wonder and tranquility. Cinematic lighting, high depth of field, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blurry, grainy, noisy, low detail, text, watermark, logo, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, disfigured, cartoon, photographic, sketch, realistic photo
